excerpt:
# Release v5.9.0


## New Model additions

### Cohere2Moe

Command A+ is a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language model from Cohere that features a hybrid attention pattern combining sliding window and full attention layers. The model incorporates both shared and routed experts and supports a very large context window for processing extensive text sequences.

**Links:** [Documentation](https://huggingface.co/docs/transformers/main/en/model_doc/cohere2_moe)
* Add new cohere2_moe model (#46115) by @Cyrilvallez in [#46115](https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/pull/46115)

### Parakeet tdt (#44171)

* Parakeet tdt (#44171) by @lmaksym

### HRM-Text

HRM-Text is an improved autoregressive language-modeling variant of the Hierarchical Reasoning Model (HRM) that uses a hierarchical recurrent forward pass with two transformer stacks - one for slow, abstract planning (H) and one for fast, detailed computation (L) - reused inside a nested recurrence. It features PrefixLM attention where instruction tokens attend bidirectionally while response tokens attend causally, per-head sigmoid output gates, and parameterless RMSNorm. The model is designed as a base language model wi
